titlestmt.author: Compiled by N. Dean, M.E. Warren

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-04-06 23:07:03 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Papers, correspondence, diaries, theses, articles, maps, surveys, reports, pamphlets, clippings, photogrpahs.
did.abstract: Materials pertaining to Warren's work in agricultural economics, both as a professor at Cornell and as a public policy advisor.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of agricultural economics and farm management at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers of George F. Warren include correspondence, theses, and articles by Warren and others; and maps, surveys, census materials, lecture notes, speeches, reports, pamphlets, clippings, photographs, and other materials pertaining to Warren's work in agricultural economics, both as a professor at Cornell and as a public policy advisor. Specific topics include agriculture lectures at Cornell, the United States economy and agricultural policies, Warren's activities as economic advisor to Franklin D. Roosevelt during his presidency, the gold standard for U.S. currency, the War Food Administration (1917-1919), New York State Food Supply Commission (dealing primarily with milk supply), Warren's trips to Europe in 1924 for the Tariff Commission, the International Conferences on Agricultural Economics (1929, 1933, 1936), the Committee for the Nation to Rebuild Prices and Purchasing Power (1933-1935), the New York State Planning Board (1934-1935), and related subjects. Also, a series of "diaries" compiled by Warren to document his activities, which include correspondence, memos, reports, drafts, photographs, printed material, and notes; a bound volume of correspondence (1928-1939) regarding "Interrelationships of Supply and Price," a bulletin written by Warren and Frank A. Pearson; and a volume of "Speeches on Prices." Original manuscript for Prices by Warren and Frank Pearson (3 vols.). And 20 household accounts (1906-1931). Annotated nineteenth edition of Elements of Agriculture with edits for the subsequent edition.

Also, original personal letters written to George Warren, with a volume of typed transcripts by Ruth Warren Gerlach: "Letters from Home Written to George Frederick Warren (1874-1938) from 1892 to 1911"; and family photographs. Correspondence with Irving Fisher and James Harvey Rogers. Chapters from a book on Harley and Verda Warren, George Warren's nephew.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: George F. Warren papers, #21-10-77. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

International Conference on Agricultural Economics (Date of meeting or treaty signing: (1936).)

did.unittitle: Chapters on Oats, Barley, Rye, and Flax
Statement by Lloyd S. Tenny to Senate
"Economic Outlook for Agriculture in the U.S."
"Economic Outlook for Agriculture in the U.S."
Public Problems of Agriculture, Term II Lectures and Assignments
"Agricultural Survey of Caledonia, Avon, York, Geneseo, Lima, Livingston County, New York"
"Geographical, Economic, and Social Condition of Agriculture in the U.S."
Bound volume of correspondence concerning "Interelationships of Supply and Price," a bulletin written by Warren and Frank A. Pearson
Printed Materials on Ithaca's Alken Farm
The Price-Campbell Cotton Picker Corporation in Dallas, Texas
A Blueprint Map of the Taft Ranch (Corpus Christie Bay)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annotated throughout by Warren and with some original photos used for illustrations.

did.unittitle: George and Mary Warren account book of personal expenditures
The Mechanical Analysis of Soils, C.U. Bachelor of Sciences thesis
A Soil Survey of the Cornell University Farms, C.U. Master of Science thesis
Annotated copy of Farm Management by GFW, New York: The MacMillan Company
1 Volume of miscellaneous speeches on economic conditions,
1 Volume of Miscellaneous speeches agriculture in New York State,
1 Volume of miscellaneous speeches on the currency question,
Prices of Farm Products in New York,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original typewritten manuscript of N.Y. Agricultural Experiment Station Bulletin 416

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original typewritten manuscript by G. F. Warren and F. A. Pearson. In 3 volumes

did.unittitle: Journal of Warren's farm operation giving pay for family labor, inventories of fall plowing, etc., 1 bound vol.
Account Books, 15 bound and 16 unbound volumes for Warren's household and farm operation
Journals, 4 large bound vols. of Warren's household and farm
Bound volume Letters from Home. Includes letters written to George Frederick Warren from 1892 to 1911 compiled by Ruth Warren Gerlach, May 2003.
Correspondence between Warren and James Harvey Rogers (Yale economist) and Irving Fisher
Chapters from a book by Larry Olson on Harley and Verda Warren
Group panorama photograph of a conference
Telegrams and letters of condolence sent to the family of George F. Warren at the time of his death
Notebook and scrapbook from time at Nebraska

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains programs for the agricultural banquets, the Cosmopolitan Club, commencement, the Lyceum Theatre, Senior Week, Class Day, and clippings.

did.unittitle: Letter to George Warren from his mother
